_label_note: KR Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. The generated must-not label for “Ms. Hana Park” was rejected because the text is an actual named-person reference.
